session_note: S72 (user GO -- full autonomous batch, highest quality). Executing carried S71 PDR P2 (Pac-Man hunter) + P3 (potato bomb, Fork E from-SPAWN) + P4 (CHECK carry-forward polish). PLAN carried from S71 Full Council; each priority DO -> Triumvirate CHECK -> commit/push/CI.
council_battle_ledger: S71 Full 3-way Council (Claude+Grok-4.20-reasoning+Gemini-2.5-pro). P1/P2: Fork A bump 4->5 UNANIMOUS; Fork B SPLIT->synthesis (keep single §VIII.4 sever path, PIN deterministic all-topology leaf-first cost-ASC/BondId-ASC selection w/ prim-cap; Grok R3 CONVERGE); Fork C separate hunters Map UNANIMOUS. Adopted: bomb NOT carried (instant), hunter-target-disconnect immediate despawn (crash fix), once/game flag, DROP_SPARK reuse, tiebreak lowest PlayerId. P3 (amendment): Fork D separate potatoes Map UNANIMOUS (reversed shared-Map); Fork F radial-delete UNANIMOUS + determinism guards; Fork E ESCALATED-to-user (from-spawn chosen); carrier-disconnect force-detonate; carry-slot exclusive. See PDR doc.
prime_audit: S71 PRIME-AUDIT: P1/P2 -- removed a host-crash class (hunter->disconnected target null avatarPos), the carried-bomb edge class (instant detonation), orphaned-bench (teardown clears benchedUntilTick); pinned Fork-B algo as a pure fn of frozen pre-state + (cost ASC, BondId ASC), loops handled (cycle bond cost 0), fraction-vs-cap defined (cap wins, empty->fizzle). P3 -- reversed Fork D to separate Map on a sound argument; AoE determinism fully closed (host-only computed + snapshot-replicated => no client divergence; squared-dist + sorted-ID guards are for replay only, consistent w/ §10.5 same-browser float determinism); from-spawn carried potato can self-detonate (the hot-potato risk, reinforces Fork-E user decision). Materially > R1 sketches. Confidence HIGH.

priorities.label: S71 P1 (Full) -- BOMB hazard. Spawner drops a stationary bomb in the spawn zone every random 8-15 sparks (deterministic, max 1 live); grab = INSTANT detonation severing ~25% of the PICKER own bonds, leaf-first (cost ASC, BondId ASC over frozen pre-state) with a prim blast-cap; un-grabbed 15s -> dissipate. SEPARATE world.bombs Map (NOT a 7th SparkType); new TRIGGER_BOMB client intent + PROTOCOL_VERSION 4->5; new SEVER_BOND cause "bomb" (bypass charge/auth); additive-optional bombs[] snapshot; BOMB_EXPLODE effect + BombRenderer. Files: worldTypes, constants, spawner, world.ts, bombLifecycle(new), severBond/disruptionManager, controls, protocol, save, effects, bombRenderer(new)+effects/bombExplode(new), effectsRenderer+lifetime, main.ts + tests + e2e. GATE: tsc + knip0 + vitest + save.replay + build<=550KB + boot-smoke + Playwright. CHECK Triumvirate + Rule22.
priorities.check_method: S71 P1 (bomb hazard) VERIFIED + SHIPPED f500b78. Host-only spawner drops a STATIONARY bomb every 8-15 sparks (SEPARATE seeded bombRng -> spark stream byte-identical, test-proven); grab = INSTANT self-sever of ~25% of the PICKER's OWN bonds, LEAF-FIRST (cost-ASC, BondId-ASC over the FROZEN pre-state, blast-capped) via the locked §VIII.4 SEVER_BOND path (new cause 'bomb' bypasses charge/auth like 'creature'); 15s tick-based dissipate; SEPARATE world.bombs entity (not a 7th SparkType); new TRIGGER_BOMB client intent -> PROTOCOL_VERSION 4->5; additive-optional bombs[] + BOMB_EXPLODE in NetSnapshot; teardown (applyReturnToTitle + main.ts) clears world.bombs + nextBombId + bombRenderer. GATES: tsc 0, knip 0, vitest 1054 (+15 new: bombLifecycle 9 incl. cost-beats-id / cycle-no-leaf-opens-ring / own-color-only / determinism, spawner cadence 3 incl. byte-identical-spark-stream proof, save roundtrip+back-compat 2, protocol allowlist 1), save.replay byte-equivalence GREEN (determinism preserved), vite build 516.83KB (<550 charter, +4.3KB), Playwright gating 24/24 (the 2 protocol-mismatch e2e updated for the v4->5 bump: older joiner v2, newer joiner v6). CHECK Triumvirate: RALPH:PATROL CLEAN (backpressure sweep green); GROK-ANALYST PASS (clean/deterministic/no-regression); GEMINI-AUDITOR CONDITIONAL PASS 5/4/4 -> all edges triaged + logged, NOT rubber-stamped: host-migration carrying bomb state = N/A in v1 (no migration, LOCKED §13.7, folds into netcode backlog); spawner bombRng not serialized = PRE-EXISTING spark-spawner posture (reconstructed from SEED), not bomb-introduced, save.replay green; teardown-on-RETURN_TO_TITLE matches the locked creature pattern; explosion SFX silent = deliberate visual-only v1 (deferred polish). NET SHIP (2/3 PASS + 1 CONDITIONAL, no blockers, FIX-THEN-SHIP not needed). Rule22 runtime audit CLEAN: pure TS game code + tests, no env-VAR placeholders / Docker / CLI flags / restart-survival paths; all imports resolve (tsc 0); real-browser Playwright IS the boot-then-smoke. Post-push CI (deploy + e2e) triggers on f500b78 -- confirm in the handoff Rule22 pass. checkpoint f500b78.

priorities.label: S71 P2 (Full) -- PAC-MAN HUNTER. At leader-reaches-37/50 (75%), spawn once a hunter that chases the leading player avatarPos for 30s; catch (dist<CATCH_RADIUS) -> benchedUntilTick=tick+1800 (avatar hidden + input locked) + DROP_SPARK; no catch in 30s -> despawn (juke-able). SEPARATE world.hunters Map (Voltkin untouched; reuse pure arrive-steering). CRITICAL: target disconnect/eliminate -> immediate despawn, all avatarPos guarded. once/game non-resettable flag; teardown clears hunters+hunterSpawned+every benchedUntilTick. additive-optional hunters[]+benchedUntilTick snapshot. Files: worldTypes, constants, world.ts, hunters/hunterLifecycle+hunterAI(new), controls, avatarRenderer, hunterRenderer(new), save, main.ts + tests + e2e.
priorities.check_method: S72 P2 (Pac-Man hunter) VERIFIED + SHIPPED 97e4616. Leading player first reaching 75% (HUNTER_TRIGGER_SCORE=floor(50*0.75)=37) spawns ONCE a host-authoritative hunter (SEPARATE world.hunters Map; Voltkin §13.15 LOCKED+untouched, Council Fork C) chasing target.avatarPos via DETERMINISTIC per-tick momentum pursuit (hunterPursue: damped Verlet velocity + steer + capped HUNTER_MAX_SPEED=7, DAMPING=0.9 -> juke-able vs instant cursor); contact (HUNTER_CATCH_RADIUS=30, squared-dist gate) -> benchedUntilTick=tick+1800 (avatar HIDDEN via avatarRenderer + input LOCKED via controls.isInputLocked, both gate on isBenched tick-compare -> self-heal at expiry) + drop carried spark (REUSE DROP_SPARK; bench set BEFORE drop so it survives the fsmDrop player-object reconstruction); 30s uncaught -> DESPAWNING fade -> remove. CRITICAL crash-guard (Council Gemini #1): target disconnect/eliminate -> immediate world.hunters.delete + EVERY avatarPos read behind the player-missing guard. Host-internal actions (SPAWN_HUNTER/HUNTER_TICK/HUNTER_CATCH) -> NO PROTOCOL_VERSION bump (stays v5; the S71 v4->5 covers the batch) + KNOWN_GAME_ACTION_TYPES_RECORD tripwire updated (inert wire-allow, friends-only). Additive-optional hunters[]/hunterSpawned/benchedUntilTick in NetSnapshot (applySnapshotCore clears+rebuilds players+hunters each apply -> no stale bench; client renders the wedge facing the chased avatar + chomp from the serialized CATCHING state). SOLO avatarPos now tracks the cursor (gate widened PLAYING&&isNetworked -> PLAYING; the hunter is the first consumer of a solo avatarPos). Teardown: WIN_TRIGGER (teardownHunters) + applyReturnToTitle (inline) + applyStartGame (defensive start-of-match invariant, CHECK) clear hunters+nextHunterId+hunterSpawned+every benchedUntilTick. GATES: tsc 0, knip 0, vitest 1076 (+22: findLeadingPlayer+tiebreak, spawn-once guard, steer-toward-avatar, catch->bench+CATCHING-hold->despawn, drop-carried+bench-preserved, escape-on-timeout, CRITICAL target-disconnect-despawn, teardownHunters, WIN+START_GAME teardown-wiring via dispatch, isBenched, hunterPursue determinism/speed-cap/moves-toward, save hunters+hunterSpawned+benchedUntilTick roundtrip+back-compat). save.replay byte-equivalence GREEN (hunter has no RNG + empty in the replay world). vite build 521.66KB (<550 charter, +4.83KB). Playwright gating 25 pass + 1 pre-existing skip -- NEW solo hunter spec (spawn->chase->catch->bench, zero pageerror) + ALL 24 prior specs green (no regression; no protocol bump this time). CHECK Triumvirate: RALPH:PATROL CLEAN. GROK-ANALYST FIX-THEN-SHIP -> triaged: BLOCKER avatarPos-null-deref REJECTED (avatarPos is a REQUIRED always-init Vec2 -- makeIdlePlayer/pickup/drop/rehydrate all set it -- so the player-missing guard fully covers it); HIGH stale-bench-on-client REJECTED (applySnapshotCore clears+rebuilds players/hunters EVERY snapshot + the emit gate spans WIN so the host teardown propagates); MED silent try/catch ACCEPTED -> dev console.error; LOW prevPos contract REJECTED (already explicit in makeHunter+deserializeHunter). GEMINI-AUDITOR F3/Q3/C2 BLOCK -> triaged: HIGH teardown-completeness -> complete for the ACTUAL FSM (POSTGAME only reachable from WIN which clears) but ACCEPTED a defensive applyStartGame teardown invariant; MED bench-overwrite ACCEPTED -> Math.max; HIGH catch/WIN same-tick race REJECTED (both orderings yield the SAME correct end state -- WIN_TRIGGER teardown clears any bench, winner ends unbenched); LOW disconnect-fade REJECTED (PDR LOCKS immediate despawn as the #1 crash-fix). NET SHIP: both reviewers blockers verified FALSE POSITIVES against the actual code; 3 genuine defensive hardening adopted (applyStartGame invariant, Math.max bench, dev-log) + 2 tests added. Rule22 runtime audit CLEAN: pure TS game code + tests; no env-VAR placeholders / Docker / CLI flags / restart-survival paths; all imports resolve (tsc 0); the protocol Record tripwire is a static-validation update; the real-browser Playwright gating lane IS the boot-then-smoke. checkpoint 97e4616.

priorities.label: S71 P3 (Full; Scope Amendment) -- POTATO BOMB. Spawner drops a carryable potato; PICKUP_POTATO (carry-slot exclusive w/ spark) -> carry -> PLACE_POTATO onto a structure -> ARMED; ~23s fuse FROM SPAWN (user); POTATO_DETONATE = deterministic radial AoE (prims within R via dx*dx+dy*dy<=R*R squared-dist, iterated sorted-PrimitiveId, delete + incident bonds + cleanup); owner-agnostic, position-based area-denial, no chain reaction. SEPARATE world.potatoes Map; carrier-disconnect FORCE-DETONATE at last pos. DROP_POTATO. additive potatoes[]+carriedPotatoId snapshot. Files: worldTypes, constants, spawner, world.ts, potatoLifecycle(new), controls, net handlers, save, potatoRenderer(new), main.ts + tests + e2e.
priorities.check_method: S72 P3 (potato bomb) VERIFIED + SHIPPED 76af09a. Host spawner drops a carryable potato in the spawn zone on its OWN seeded cadence (SEPARATE potatoRng — a THIRD stream after spark rng + bombRng; spark + bomb sequences byte-identical, test-proven). PICKUP_POTATO (carry-slot MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with a spark — applyPickupPotato rejects if Carrying/carriedPotatoId; applyPickupSpark rejects if carriedPotatoId; BOTH directions tested) -> CARRIED (follows the carrier avatar via the host poll) -> PLACE_POTATO (ARMED at cursor) or DROP_POTATO (ARMED at last pos); ~23s FROM-SPAWN fuse (Fork E user; one-line-flippable to from-placement) -> POTATO_DETONATE. AoE = DETERMINISTIC position-based radial (squared-dist NO sqrt + victims SORTED PrimitiveId + incident bonds SORTED BondId; owner-AGNOSTIC; POSITION-based area-denial fires on empty coord; NO chain reaction) deleting prims within POTATO_BLAST_RADIUS + incident bonds via the LOCKED snapPrevPosForUnbonded cleanup; reuses BOMB_EXPLODE (wire-mirrored) for the burst. SEPARATE world.potatoes Map (Council Fork D). NO PROTOCOL_VERSION bump (Council: the S71 v4->5 covers the P1/P2/P3 batch; POTATO client intents wire-allowed under v5; protocol-mismatch e2e v2/v6 unbroken); additive-optional potatoes[]/carriedPotatoId snapshot (client rebuilds each apply; renders FREE/CARRIED/ARMED + fuse-countdown VFX). Carrier-disconnect -> force-detonate at last-synced pos (deterministic sim-loop poll, NOT a net handler). Teardown: WIN_TRIGGER (teardownPotatoes) + applyReturnToTitle (inline) + applyStartGame (start-of-match invariant). GATES: tsc 0, knip 0, vitest 1093 (+17: spawn, pickup/place/drop, both-direction carry-exclusion, AoE deletes-in-R/spares-out/owner-agnostic/position-based-empty/no-chain/determinism, carrier-slot-clear-on-in-hand-detonate, teardown, save potatoes+carriedPotatoId roundtrip+back-compat). save.replay byte-equivalence GREEN (separate potatoRng + squared-dist + sorted-ID AoE = replay-safe). vite build 528.18KB (<550, +6.5KB). Playwright gating 27 pass + 1 pre-existing skip (2 NEW potato specs: auto-detonate-on-fuse via the host poll, grab->carry->place->ARMED via controls; ALL prior green incl. protocol-mismatch — no regression, no bump). CHECK Triumvirate: RALPH:PATROL CLEAN. GROK-ANALYST FIX-THEN-SHIP -> triaged: HIGH client-pos-object-identity REJECTED (no client code holds a potato.pos ref across frames — potatoRenderer reads fresh each sync like the shipped bomb/hunter/creature renderers; the clear+rebuild is the proven pattern); MED DROP-stale-prevPos ACCEPTED (hygiene: prevPos=pos on drop — vestigial in v1, forward-compat); LOW carrier-disconnect-continue REJECTED (dispatch is SYNCHRONOUS; the detonate fires this tick; the skipped fuse-check is moot). GEMINI-AUDITOR F5/Q4/C3 CONDITIONAL -> triaged: MED teardown-on-DRAW REJECTED (SPARK has NO DRAW state; POSTGAME only from WIN which clears; + the START_GAME start-of-match invariant IS the centralized safety net Gemini asked for); LOW no-bump cosmetic mixed-version gap ACCEPTED as a LOGGED known-issue (BOTH reviewers validated no-bump under friends-only). NET SHIP: blockers verified false-positive against the actual code; 1 hygiene fix applied. Rule22 runtime audit CLEAN: pure TS game code + tests; the protocol Record is a static-validation update (no version change); the real-browser Playwright gating lane IS the boot-then-smoke. checkpoint 76af09a.

priorities.label: S72 P4 (Micro; CHECK carry-forward polish) -- bomb/potato detonation BOOM SFX (playBoomSFX on BOMB_EXPLODE, covers both the S71 bomb + S72 potato) + defensive applyStartGame bomb-clear (start-of-match invariant for all 3 hazards). spawner-rng-not-serialized stays in netcode/save backlog (user note). Files: render/audioManager(+test), state/gameMode, state/bombLifecycle.test.
priorities.council_waiver_reason: Micro-tier CHECK carry-forward polish (audio synth mirroring 3 proven SFX + a no-op-when-empty reducer clear); user pre-approved the full batch. CHECK = RALPH:PATROL + GROK-ANALYST (Micro), not full Triumvirate.
priorities.check_method: S72 P4 (CHECK carry-forward polish, Micro) VERIFIED + SHIPPED 309024c. (1) Bomb/potato detonation BOOM -- was SILENT visual-only in v1 (S71 deferred): playBoomSFX (procedural sine sub-bass 160->40Hz exp drop + lowpass + punchy exp-decay gain) fired on BOMB_EXPLODE, which BOTH the bomb (applyTriggerBomb) AND the potato (applyPotatoDetonate) emit -> ONE SFX covers both; mirrors playChargeSFX/playFartSFX (resume-guard, optional PannerNode, sfxGain bus, duckMusic 450ms); pure boomFreq helper + unit test. (2) Defensive applyStartGame bombs-clear (alongside the hunter+potato clears) -> completes the "no hazard pre-game" start-of-match invariant for all THREE hazards (RETURN_TO_TITLE already covered the exit path; no-op-when-empty). spawner-rng-not-serialized stays in the netcode/save backlog (user note). GATES: tsc 0, knip 0, vitest 1096 (+3: boomFreq x2 + START_GAME-clears-bomb), vite build 529.04KB (<550). CHECK Micro (RALPH:PATROL + GROK-ANALYST) PASS: audio is render-layer (replay-safe lastDrainedTick cursor untouched, no sim state); the bomb-clear is a no-op-when-empty line mirroring 2 proven clears. Rule22: pure TS + audio synth, no env/Docker/CLI/restart paths. checkpoint 309024c.

reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #bomb-hazard #council-full #protocol-bump #deterministic-sever #fork-b-synthesis: shipped the pickup BOMB (f500b78) -- host spawner drops a stationary orb every 8-15 sparks (SEPARATE bombRng keeps the spark stream byte-identical), grab = INSTANT self-sever of ~25% of YOUR bonds via a Council-pinned DETERMINISTIC leaf-first (cost-ASC, BondId-ASC, frozen pre-state, blast-capped) selection through the locked §VIII.4 path (new cause 'bomb'). DEFINING MOVES: (1) Fork B was R1-SPLIT (Grok: lowest-BondId meaningless + cascade-catastrophic; Gemini: keep single semantic) -> synthesized a THIRD position (keep §VIII.4 BUT pin a deterministic blast-capped leaf-first selection) that BOTH converged on (Gemini R2 + Grok R3). (2) A SEPARATE bombRng stream = zero perturbation of the spark RNG -> save.replay byte-equivalence held + ZERO existing-test breakage (proven by a byte-identical-spark-stream test). (3) PROTOCOL_VERSION 4->5 for the new TRIGGER_BOMB intent (unanimous Fork A) broke 3 protocol.test + 2 e2e mismatch tests AS EXPECTED -> updated (v2-older / v6-newer). (4) CHECK Gemini CONDITIONAL findings triaged, not accepted wholesale. LESSON: a selection algorithm pinned over the FROZEN pre-state (not live-mutating counts) + an explicit total-order tiebreak (cost, then id) turns a 'sometimes you just lose' mechanic replay-safe; a SEPARATE RNG stream is the clean way to add stochastic content without perturbing existing determinism.

P2 #pac-man-hunter #council-full #separate-map #crash-guard #triumvirate-triage: shipped the Pac-Man hunter (97e4616) -- leader-reaches-75% spawns ONCE a host-authoritative hunter chasing target.avatarPos via deterministic capped-momentum pursuit (juke-able); catch -> 30s bench (avatar hidden + input locked, both via the isBenched tick-compare self-heal) + DROP_SPARK reuse; 30s escape -> despawn. SEPARATE world.hunters Map (Voltkin LOCKED untouched). NO PROTOCOL_VERSION bump (host-internal actions; the S71 v5 stands); additive snapshot. DEFINING MOVES: (1) the §13.15 "do-not-import-outside-creatureVerlet.test" LOCK on the steering helpers -> wrote a SELF-CONTAINED hunterAI.hunterPursue mirroring the proven Verlet math (zero Voltkin coupling, Fork C honored) instead of importing. (2) Rule-21 State-Discovery caught a SOLO avatarPos gap -- avatarPos was only dispatched in networked mode pre-S72, so the host-sim hunter would chase a FROZEN point in solo -> widened the gate to PLAYING (the hunter is the first consumer of a solo avatarPos); invisible to tsc+unit, only the design-trace + the solo e2e caught it. (3) Player is a readonly discriminated union -> threaded benchedUntilTick through pickup()/drop() so the bench survives the fsmDrop reconstruction when the caught player drops their spark (bench set BEFORE the drop). (4) the protocol KNOWN_GAME_ACTION_TYPES_RECORD tsc tripwire caught the union expansion -> added the 3 host-internal hunter actions. (5) CHECK: BOTH external reviewers returned blockers (Grok avatarPos null-deref; Gemini teardown-incompleteness) that I REJECTED as false positives after verifying against the actual code -- then adopted the 3 genuinely-valuable defensive hardening + 2 tests. LESSON: a reviewer "BLOCKER" is a hypothesis to verify against the code, not an order -- reject false positives WITH REASONING + adopt the real hardening; and a host-side sim entity that reads player state must audit EVERY mode that populates that state.

P3 #potato-bomb #council-full #fork-e-from-spawn #radial-aoe #separate-rng-stream #no-bump: shipped the carryable potato bomb (76af09a) — host spawner drops it on a SEPARATE potatoRng cadence (3rd stream; spark + bomb byte-identical); grab (carry-slot exclusive w/ spark, BOTH directions) -> carry (follows avatar) -> place/drop -> ~23s from-SPAWN fuse -> deterministic position-based radial AoE (squared-dist + sorted PrimitiveId/BondId; owner-agnostic; no chain reaction) via the locked snapPrevPosForUnbonded cleanup. SEPARATE world.potatoes Map. DEFINING MOVES: (1) NO PROTOCOL_VERSION bump for the new client intents — honored the S71 Council "single v4->5 covers the batch" + a bump would have broken the protocol-mismatch e2e (which hardcode v6) = the "v5-bump-broke-2-e2e" lesson in REVERSE; BOTH CHECK reviewers validated no-bump under friends-only. (2) carrier-disconnect handled in the main.ts sim-loop poll (carrier missing -> force-detonate at last pos), NOT a net handler — deterministic + covers more cases + zero netcode-file risk. (3) reused BOMB_EXPLODE (wire-mirrored) for the burst instead of a new effect kind -> no effects.ts/save churn. (4) the radial AoE deletes prims DIRECTLY (not via the topology-split applySeverBond) since it is position-based, reusing only the endpoint-set-removal + snapPrevPosForUnbonded cleanup primitives. (5) CHECK: both reviewers blockers REJECTED as false-positives against the actual code (no client pos-ref staleness; dispatch synchronous; no DRAW state) — same discipline as P2. LESSON: when an architect prior-PDR decision (single-bump-for-batch) collides with incremental-deploy reality, weigh the alternative cost (e2e churn + over-bump stranding) vs the risk (a cosmetic friends-only mixed-version gap), and let the adversarial reviewers VALIDATE the call rather than assume it.

P4 #check-carry-forward #bomb-sfx #start-of-match-invariant #effect-kind-reuse: shipped the detonation BOOM + the defensive applyStartGame bomb-clear (309024c). DEFINING MOVE: the boom fires on BOMB_EXPLODE, which BOTH the S71 bomb AND the S72 potato emit -> a single ~25-LOC procedural SFX (mirroring the 3 existing charge/fart/clave synths) gave BOTH hazards their detonation audio in one stroke. The bomb-clear completed the "no hazard pre-game" start-of-match invariant for all THREE hazards (bomb+hunter+potato) -- the belt-and-suspenders the S71 CHECK + this session P2/P3 CHECKs all converged on. LESSON: reusing a shared GameEffect kind (BOMB_EXPLODE) across two features means a single later polish pass lands for both -- effect-kind reuse compounds downstream.

fork_decisions.fork_B_bomb_damage: reuse §VIII.4 sever + pinned leaf-first cost-ASC/BondId-ASC deterministic selection w/ prim-cap
fork_decisions.fork_E_potato_fuse: from-SPAWN (user reading; Council preferred from-placement) -- TUNABLE

carry_forward: === RESOLVED S72 === P2 PAC-MAN HUNTER (97e4616): leader-reaches-75% spawns ONCE a host-authoritative hunter chasing the avatar via deterministic capped-momentum pursuit (juke-able); catch -> 30s bench (avatar hidden + input locked) + DROP_SPARK; 30s escape -> despawn. SEPARATE world.hunters Map; CRITICAL target-disconnect crash-guard; solo avatarPos fix; no protocol bump; additive snapshot. P3 POTATO BOMB (76af09a): carryable from-SPAWN-fuse (Fork E user) radial-AoE weapon; SEPARATE world.potatoes Map + separate potatoRng (spark+bomb byte-identical); carry-1 exclusive w/ spark (both directions); deterministic position-based AoE (squared-dist + sorted PrimitiveId/BondId; owner-agnostic; no chain reaction); carrier-disconnect force-detonate (sim-loop poll); NO protocol bump (Council batch-bump). P4 (309024c): detonation BOOM SFX (covers bomb+potato) + defensive applyStartGame bomb-clear. Teardown invariant for all 3 hazards on WIN/RETURN_TO_TITLE/START_GAME. === LOGGED CHECK CARRY-FORWARDS (S72, not dropped) === (a) NO-BUMP cosmetic mixed-version gap: a stale-v5 (P2-build) client joining a P3-build host sees prims vanish from a potato AoE without rendering the potato -- accepted friends-only trade-off (both CHECK reviewers validated no-bump); if a future feature needs cross-version safety, revisit the S52 new-client-intent->bump precedent. (b) Centralized PLAYING-exit teardown (Gemini P3): the current per-trigger (WIN_TRIGGER) + RETURN_TO_TITLE + START_GAME-invariant fully covers the actual FSM (no DRAW state), but a single PLAYING-exit teardown hook would be cleaner if the FSM grows. (c) spawner rng/bombRng/potatoRng not serialized -> save/load resets spawn cadence (PRE-EXISTING spark-spawner posture; folds into netcode/save-determinism backlog). (d) hunter disconnect-fade (PDR locks immediate despawn; optional polish). (e) Fork E potato fuse from-SPAWN is one-line-flippable to from-placement (makePotato + applyPlacePotato) if playtest prefers Council's. === CONFIRM AT NEXT BOOT (Rule 22) === P3 (76af09a) + P4 (309024c) post-push CI E2E were in-flight at handoff (local Playwright 27/27 green); confirm both green. === PRE-EXISTING BACKLOG (prioritized for next session; NOT started S72 -- ORANGE budget + each is multi-session) === 1. STABLE LOBBY SEATS (non-compacting) -- likely the most tractable + highest user-value next; bounded scope (lobby/seating). 2. CONTROL-MESSAGE SENDER-AUTH -- security hardening; bounded, raises the v1 threat model past friends-only. 3. EYES fog fuzzy-edge + CVD shape-icons -- render/accessibility feature; self-contained. 4. LIVE-PLAY NETCODE INFRA (host-migration / reconnect / 6p delta) -- LARGEST (genuinely multi-session); also the home for the spawner-rng-serialization + the no-bump cross-version work above. Recommend: tackle #1 or #3 as a single-priority Standard PDR next session; #4 needs its own multi-session plan. === OTHER (pre-existing) === main.ts Pixi/DOM shell hypertrophy (de-hypertrophy candidate).
triumvirate_check: S71 P1 CHECK = Triumvirate. RALPH:PATROL CLEAN (tsc/knip0/vitest1054/build516.83KB/Playwright24 all green). GROK-ANALYST PASS (no correctness/determinism/regression bug; pre-state-frozen selection + pure severSplit + skip-if-missing all sound). GEMINI-AUDITOR CONDITIONAL PASS (Fidelity5/Quality4/Completeness4) -> edges triaged + logged (host-migration N/A v1; spawner-not-serialized pre-existing; teardown matches creature pattern; explosion-SFX deferred polish). NET SHIP 2/3 PASS, no blockers. Grok 1 call (CHECK) + Gemini 1 call (CHECK) this phase (~$0.10); plus 4 Council PLAN calls earlier (~$0.30).
session_status: S72 COMPLETE -- all 4 priorities shipped + Triumvirate/Micro CHECK SHIP: P2 hunter (97e4616), P3 potato bomb (76af09a), P4 detonation-boom + bomb-clear (309024c) [P1 bomb was S71].
